glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.description: Manage your specialized terminology dictionaries for more accurate translations.
glossary.noGlossariesDescription: Create your first glossary to ensure consistent terminology across your translations.
glossary.noResultsDescription: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria.
glossary.deleteGlossaryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this glossary? All terms within it will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
glossary.name: Name

terms.title: Terms
terms.deleteTermConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this term? This action cannot be undone.
terms.noTermsDescription: Add your first term to start building this glossary.
terms.bulkImportDescription: Paste CSV data or upload a CSV file. Each row should have a source term and target term separated by a comma.
terms.bulkImportPlaceholder:
machine learning, học máy
artificial intelligence, trí tuệ nhân tạo
neural network, mạng nơ-ron
terms.bulkImportUploadHint: or drag & drop a .csv file here
terms.bulkImportError: Import failed. Please check your data and try again.
terms.bulkImportParseError: Could not parse CSV. Ensure each line has two comma-separated values.
terms.bulkImportMaxExceeded: Maximum {max} terms per import. You have {count} terms.
terms.bulkImportNoData: No valid terms found. Please paste or upload CSV data.
